dsl_rule.translation_notes: Signal prevents entries when price is in extended territory. For long entries, price_pos_20 < 0.80 ensures price is not in top 20% of 20-period range (avoiding overbought extension). For short entries, price_pos_20 > 0.20 ensures price is not in bottom 20% of 20-period range (avoiding oversold extension). Exit conditions use standard reversal at SMA_20 as a reasonable default per rule 8. The [THRESHOLD_NEEDED] parameters default to 20th/80th percentile positioning, which is a common extension threshold.

For short entries, price_pos_20 > 0.20 ensures price is not in bottom 20% of 20-period range (avoiding oversold extension). source_rule_text: Avoid entry signals when an indicator is in extended territory (overbought on long entries, oversold on short entries), as extension often signals real market strength rather than reversal opportunity.
